subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Recite that which the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'an: "O My son! Should it be but the weight of a mustard seed..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی اقرء ما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان یا بنی انها ان تک مثقال حبه من خردل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
